content.claim: Total fertility rate in Hungary has fallen to 1.31 children per woman in 2025, down from 1.39 in 2024 and far below the 2.1 replacement level, with regional variation: Zala County experienced a 25% birth decline in H1 2024 compared to H1 2021, versus 22% in Budapest.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Demography lens
limitations: Regional birth decline data cover only a single 6-month period (H1 2024 vs. H1 2021); longer time series needed to confirm sustained trend
Does not directly measure which settlement types experience the sharpest cohort attrition
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
